verses.6: Waamma AAadun faohlikoo bireehin sarsarin AAatiyatin
verses.7: Sakhkharaha AAalayhim sabAAa layalin wathamaniyata ayyamin husooman fatara alqawma feeha sarAAa kaannahum aAAjazu nakhlin khawiyatun
verses.9: Wajaa firAAawnu waman qablahu waalmutafikatu bialkhatiati
verses.10: FaAAasaw rasoola rabbihim faakhathahum akhthatan rabiyatan
verses.11: Inna lamma tagha almao hamalnakum fee aljariyati
verses.12: LinajAAalaha lakum tathkiratan wataAAiyaha othunun waAAiyatun
verses.13: Faitha nufikha fee alssoori nafkhatun wahidatun
verses.14: Wahumilati alardu waaljibalu fadukkata dakkatan wahidatan
verses.17: Waalmalaku AAala arjaiha wayahmilu AAarsha rabbika fawqahum yawmaithin thamaniyatun
verses.18: Yawmaithin tuAAradoona la takhfa minkum khafiyatun
verses.19: Faamma man ootiya kitabahu biyameenihi fayaqoolu haomu iqraoo kitabiyah
verses.24: Kuloo waishraboo haneean bima aslaftum fee alayyami alkhaliyati
verses.25: Waamma man ootiya kitabahu bishimalihi fayaqoolu ya laytanee lam oota kitabiyah
verses.32: Thumma fee silsilatin tharAAuha sabAAoona thiraAAan faoslukoohu
verses.33: Innahu kana la yuminu biAllahi alAAatheemi
verses.41: Wama huwa biqawli shaAAirin qaleelan ma tuminoona
verses.42: Wala biqawli kahinin qaleelan ma tathakkaroona
verses.47: Fama minkum min ahadin AAanhu hajizeena
